message:
feat(core): add memory ownership graph and fixed-block pool (ft-2p9cb.3.1.1)

MemoryDomain enum (8 domains), stage_to_domain mapping, PoolConfig,
MemoryPool with O(1) alloc/free via free list, growth, exhaustion,
backpressure, PoolSnapshot diagnostics. 16 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
